reviews.review_description: It is overly fun and really fun to play.Put like nobody on I know that's not y'all's fault , so i'm still gonna put it ten out of ten
To loud and to hard to play
i do wish the maps were bigger, but it is insanely fun with friends. 10/10 Amazing game!

reviews.review_title: Game is good but could tweak some things
reviews.review_description: I love that the game has wall-running where you can gain a lot of speed, and it makes you feel like you’re actually moving. But the developer could tweak the keyboard, I can’t exit it, even when I click exit, which means I can’t get the cosmetics. Second, you can’t mute the music, which makes it sorta hard to hear people. To leave this review on a positive note, the flipping in the game makes me feel dizzy, but in a good way. Btw I’ve never gotten nauseous from a vr fame or motion sickness, but this game broke that streak I guess.

developer_response.body: thanks I'll fix the keyboard in next update.

reviews.review_description: I see the vision keep up the good work

The game is great but I feel like it needs to slightly improve its physics to compete with games like VR legs(I’m directly avoiding a stride comparison because these games are only linked through the parkour inspiration).

developer_response.body: yup I'm working on a sequel which uses rigid body physics instead

reviews.review_description: add fall damage and rolling to cancel it and free roam city that makes it w

Would recommend

I am telling all my friends abt this great game.
